title: TraineeType
description: Trainee is a worker in a training relationship, for example Apprenticeship, with an organization. The training relationship is in the context of a work relationship, the relationship between a worker and Employer or Contractee Organization for whom the worker works.

id.description: Provides a unique identifier to a specific worker (an employer specific identifier).

traineeTypeCode.description: The relationship of the worker trainee to the organization. Options are Intern, Extern, Apprentice.

trainingRelationship.description: The relationship of the worker trainee with the Employer or Contractee Organization
